final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing interior illustration of a dark gothic castle.

Style/medium: needs a "暗黑哥特" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 19th-century Victorian gothic revival architecture photography, Tim Burton's gothic production design heritage, German Expressionist film set design (The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari era); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering vaulted ceilings as a dominant architectural feature
Subject: must include candelabras and iron chain decorations as interior elements
Scene/backdrop: must include stained glass windows with blood-red light filtering through
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious and oppressive atmosphere with heavy shadows — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a blood-red dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
